ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resorts" (
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resort */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resort */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the resort (e.g., Lake Geneva, WI) */,
  "summit_elevation" INTEGER /* Summit elevation of the resort in feet */,
  "difficulty_score" REAL /* Difficulty score of the resort (e.g., 33%) */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance from a specific reference point (e.g., 10 mi) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the resort location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the resort location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the resort */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the resort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review that the rating belongs to */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort being tracked */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors to the resort */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the resort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., terrain park, night skiing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifts" (
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lift */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort the lift belongs to */,
  "lift_name" TEXT /* Name of the lift */,
  "lift_type" TEXT /* Type of lift (e.g., chairlift, gondola) */,
  "vertical_rise" INTEGER /* Vertical rise of the lift in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifts_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort the trail belongs to */,
  "trail_name" TEXT /* Name of the trail */,
  "trail_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the trail (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "trail_length" INTEGER /* Length of the trail in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trails_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)
column_names: Location of the resort (e.g., Lake Geneva, WI)
Summit elevation of the resort in feet
Distance from a specific reference point (e.g., 10 mi)
URL of the user's profile picture
ID of the resort being reviewed
ID of the user who wrote the review
ID of the review that the rating belongs to
ID of the resort being tracked
Number of visitors to the resort
ID of the resort the feature belongs to
Type of feature (e.g., terrain park, night skiing)
ID of the resort the lift belongs to
Vertical rise of the lift in feet
ID of the resort the trail belongs to
Difficulty level of the trail (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced)
Length of the trail in feet
